product_overview: A mobile-first single-page application that guides Eltex customers through submitting property documents, region-specific legal signatures, and an optional energy-certificate survey, then lets them review and submit the completed project to Eltex. Admin assessors access a password-protected dashboard to review and download submitted projects.
core_goals: Locate an existing project by entering a Spanish mobile number and continue the submission flow
Upload identity and property documents and confirm AI-extracted data
Select province to determine region-specific legal signing requirements and apply signatures to PDFs
Complete or skip a 4-step energy certificate survey and sign the final certificate
Review all required items in a checklist and submit the full project to Eltex
Enable assessors to log in, review submissions, and download project packages

features.name: Phone Number Entry
features.description: Customer finds their project by entering a Spanish mobile number; a successful lookup redirects them to their project URL so they can continue the multi-step form.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Enter Spanish mobile number -> Submit phone number -> Get redirected to /?code=ELT20250001
Navigate to / -> Enter an unrecognized or invalid phone number -> Submit phone number -> See an error message indicating the number was not found

features.name: Property Document Upload
features.description: Customer uploads identity (DNI/NIE), IBI certificate, and electricity bill (photos or PDFs). The app runs AI extraction on each document and shows extracted fields for user review and confirmation.
user_flows: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001 -> Upload DNI/NIE front photo -> Review AI-extracted name and document number and expiry date -> If DNI card front-only is detected, upload DNI back photo -> Upload IBI certificate photo or PDF -> Upload electricity bill pages (one or more) -> Confirm extracted data and proceed to province selection
Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001 -> Upload DNI card front photo and attempt to proceed without uploading required DNI back photo -> See validation error requiring DNI back photo before continuing

features.name: Province Selection
features.description: Customer selects their province/region which determines whether legal signing documents are required and how many signatures must be provided.
user_flows: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001 -> Select province from the list -> Proceed to the representation/signing step
Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001 -> Select a province that does not require signing -> Proceed directly toward the next applicable step (energy certificate or review)

features.name: Legal Document Signing (Representation)
features.description: Customer draws signatures on a canvas signature pad which are overlaid onto region-specific PDF templates. The number of signatures required depends on the selected province.
user_flows: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001 -> Draw signature on signature pad -> Apply signature to first required document and review signed PDF preview -> Draw and apply signatures for remaining required documents until all required signatures (e.g., 3 for Cataluña) are completed -> Proceed to the next step
Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001 -> Observe that no signing is required for the selected province -> Proceed to the energy certificate or review step

features.name: Energy Certificate Survey
features.description: A 4-step guided survey collects technical housing data required for the energy certificate; the customer can complete and sign the certificate or choose to skip it.
user_flows: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250004 -> Fill in cadastral reference, habitable area, floor count and bedroom count -> Enter door and window counts by orientation -> Select window frame material, glass type and shutter presence -> Select thermal installation type and boiler fuel -> Select air conditioning type and heating emitter type -> Indicate product sold and existing customer status -> Draw signature on signature pad -> Finalize to complete the energy certificate
Navigate to /?code=ELT20250004 -> Choose to skip the energy certificate survey -> See the certificate step marked as skipped and continue to the review step

features.name: Review and Submit
features.description: Customer reviews a checklist of all required items and submission status, navigates back to fix any incomplete items, and submits the complete project to Eltex, receiving a success confirmation.
user_flows: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001 -> View checklist of all required items and their completion status -> Select any incomplete item to return and fix it -> Return to review and see all items complete -> Submit documentation -> See success confirmation after submission

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Password-protected dashboard for assessors to view submitted projects, inspect uploaded documents and extracted data, download project ZIP archives, and export project lists.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Enter password eltex2025 -> View list of submitted projects -> Open a project to view its uploaded documents and extracted data -> Download project ZIP -> Export project list as CSV -> Log out

code_summary.routing_notes: IMPORTANT: This is a pure SPA. ALL customer routes are accessed via the root path with a query param: /?code=ELTXXXXXX (e.g. /?code=ELT20250001). There are NO path-based customer routes like /property-docs or /review. The app uses internal React state to switch between sections (property-docs, province-selection, representation, energy-certificate, review, success). To test a specific section, navigate to /?code=ELTXXXXXX and the app routes automatically to the correct step based on form completion state. Test project ELT20250004 and ELT20250005 are pre-seeded for energy-certificate flow.

routes.description: Phone entry (no code). Navigate here and enter phone to find project.
Solar project — starts at property-docs step. All customer sections accessed via this root URL.
Solar project pre-seeded for energy-certificate flow testing
Admin dashboard. Password = eltex2025. Enter at /dashboard login page.

features.name: Phone Number Entry
features.description: Customer enters their Spanish mobile number. System looks up their project and redirects to the form with ?code=ELTXXXXXX.
user_interactions: Type phone number into input field
Click "Continuar" button to submit
See error message if number not found
Get redirected to /?code=ELTXXXXXX on success

features.name: Property Document Upload
features.description: Customer uploads identity document (DNI/NIE), IBI certificate, and electricity bill. AI extracts data from each document automatically.
user_interactions: Tap camera icon to upload DNI/NIE front photo
Review AI-extracted name, DNI number, expiry date
Tap to upload DNI back photo (required for card-front-only uploads)
Tap to upload IBI certificate photo or PDF
Tap to upload electricity bill (one or more pages)
Click "Siguiente" to proceed to province selection

features.name: Province Selection
features.description: Customer selects their province/region. This determines which legal signing documents are required.
user_interactions: Select province from dropdown or list
Click "Siguiente" to proceed

features.name: Legal Document Signing (Representation)
features.description: Customer signs region-specific legal PDFs using a canvas-based signature pad. Cataluña requires 3 signatures, Madrid/Valencia require 2, other provinces skip.
user_interactions: Draw signature on signature pad canvas
Tap "Firmar" to apply signature to document
Review signed PDF preview
Repeat for each required document
Click "Siguiente" to continue

features.name: Energy Certificate Survey
features.description: 4-step survey capturing technical housing data for the energy certificate. Customer signs the completed certificate.
user_interactions: Fill in cadastral reference, habitable area, floor count, bedroom count
Enter door and window counts by orientation (N/E/S/W)
Select window frame material, glass type, shutter presence
Select thermal installation type and boiler fuel
Select air conditioning type
Select heating emitter type
Select product sold (solar panels, aerothermal, or both)
Indicate if existing customer, if has solar panels
Draw signature on signature pad
Click "Finalizar" to complete or "Omitir" to skip

features.name: Review and Submit
features.description: Shows a checklist of all required items with completion status. Customer reviews all items and submits to Eltex.
user_interactions: View checklist of all submitted items
Click incomplete items to go back and fix them
Click "Enviar documentación" to submit
See success screen after submission

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Password-protected dashboard for Eltex assessors to view submitted projects, review documents, and download ZIPs.
user_interactions: Enter password "eltex2025" to log in
View list of all submitted projects
Click a project to view its details
View uploaded document images and extracted data
Click "Descargar ZIP" to download all project files
Click "Exportar CSV" to export project list
Click "Cerrar sesión" to log out

known_limitations.issue: Photos are stored as base64 in localStorage/IndexedDB — not sent to server during extraction, only metadata is synced
known_limitations.impact: Large images may hit localStorage quota on older devices

known_limitations.issue: Autocropper Python service may not be running in development
known_limitations.impact: Document photos will not be auto-straightened before AI extraction

known_limitations.issue: Province "other" is no longer a user-selectable option but exists in legacy data
known_limitations.impact: Old projects with location="other" will skip signing section correctly
